publications.title: TryHackMe: Overpass Series - Part 1
publications.description: Complete walkthrough of the Overpass machine focusing on RSA cryptography and web exploitation. Initial access through password cracking and SSH login.

publications.title: TryHackMe: Overpass Series - Part 2
publications.description: Continuation of Overpass series focusing on privilege escalation techniques. SUID binaries and cron job exploitation for root access.

publications.title: TryHackMe: Overpass Series - Part 3
publications.description: Final part covering advanced privilege escalation and persistence. Root access via kernel exploitation and maintaining access techniques.

publications.title: TryHackMe: Pickle Rick Machine
publications.description: Rick and Morty themed machine focusing on web exploitation and Linux privilege escalation. Command injection and sudo misconfiguration.

publications.title: TryHackMe: Wgel CTF
publications.description: WordPress exploitation and SSH key extraction. Walkthrough of WordPress vulnerability and SSH authentication bypass.

publications.title: TryHackMe: Blue Room
publications.description: Windows EternalBlue exploitation and privilege escalation. Complete walkthrough of Blue room covering all flags.

publications.title: TryHackMe: Mr. Robot CTF
publications.description: Mr. Robot themed CTF featuring web exploitation, wordlist generation, and privilege escalation. Based on the TV show.

publications.title: TryHackMe: VulnNet Series
publications.description: Comprehensive walkthrough of the VulnNet machines covering multiple vulnerabilities and privilege escalation paths.
